mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(c.name, '未分类') AS name, COUNT(a.id) AS value FROM artwork a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY a.category_id, c.name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT dates, counts FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) AS dates, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM artwork WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND DATE(create_time) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL n DAY) ) AS counts FROM ( SELECT 0 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 1 UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 ) t ) result ORDER BY dates ASC
